prompt: Create a realistic full-body professional lifestyle fashion portrait of a stylish young woman leaning confidently against a dark polished black marble building pillar in a luxurious modern urban city environment. She wears a monochromatic cream outfit: an oversized tailored blazer draped over her shoulders, a fitted cream cropped tank top, high-waisted wide-leg pleated trousers, and clean white low-top sneakers. She has wavy dark brown hair worn loose over one shoulder, delicate gold jewelry including a small pendant necklace and bracelet, and carries a sleek metallic stainless-steel water bottle in one hand. Pose her casually with one shoulder and hip against the marble pillar, one leg crossed in front of the other, relaxed hand near the trouser pocket, conveying effortless confidence and upscale street style. Use a vertical 2:3 composition, full-body framing, shallow depth of field, soft natural daylight, subtle warm highlights, crisp fabric texture, glossy marble reflections, blurred glass storefronts and city bokeh in the background. The face should be intentionally anonymized with a smooth neutral blur or obscured facial area while preserving the rest of the photorealistic portrait. High-end editorial fashion photography, 85mm lens look, natural colors, elegant minimalism, no text, no logo, no watermark.
